subject: Gaming
title: Earthbound: The Quirky Classic
description: A micro-lesson that makes Earthbound: The Quirky Classic usable.

hook.text: Earthbound flopped in America in 1995. Its ad campaign literally said 'this game stinks.' Not helpful.

buildup.text: Shigesato Itoi set an RPG in modern-day America instead of a fantasy world. You fought hippies and taxis.

discovery.text: The humor was absurd, the music was surreal, and the final boss was defeated by praying.

twist.text: Years later, Earthbound became a cult classic. Used copies sold for hundreds of dollars online.

climax.text: Earthbound's influence shows in Undertale, Omori, and countless indie RPGs that embrace weirdness.

punchline.text: A game that 'stinks.' Now a beloved cult classic worth hundreds.

quiz.question: What happened to Earthbound after its commercial failure?
options: It became a beloved cult classic with copies selling for hundreds
A sequel outsold the original immediately
